title: Fix search functionality and website proxy connections

requirements.text: Fix the Google Custom Search API integration in the backend so that search queries return real, populated results. Ensure the HTTP outcall to the Google Custom Search API is correctly constructed with the API key and Search Engine ID, and that the response is properly parsed and returned to the frontend.
acceptanceCriteria: Submitting a search query returns a non-empty list of results with title, snippet, and URL fields populated
Search results are displayed in the SearchResults component
Errors from the search API are surfaced as readable messages on the frontend

requirements.text: Fix the proxy backend endpoint so that HTTP GET requests to external websites succeed. Ensure HTTPS enforcement, proper header forwarding, and that the response body is returned intact to the frontend iframe. Debug and resolve any issues causing proxied sites to fail to load.

quotes: make all websites function and connect

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to a URL in the address bar loads the proxied website content inside the iframe
The ProxyContent component displays the proxied page without blank/error states under normal conditions
HTTPS URLs are correctly forwarded and responses are returned to the frontend

requirements.text: Fix the frontend `useProxyRequest` and `useSearchRequest` mutations in useQueries.ts so they correctly call the backend actor methods and handle both success and error responses. Ensure loading, error, and success states are properly reflected in BrowserLayout and the tab state via useTabManager.

quotes: make actual searches work and make all websites function and connect

acceptanceCriteria: Entering a URL and pressing Enter triggers a proxy request and populates the active tab with content
Entering a search query and pressing Enter triggers a search request and populates the active tab with search results
Loading indicators appear in TabBar while requests are in flight
Error states are shown when requests fail

requirements.text: Ensure that clicking a search result in SearchResults.tsx triggers navigation to that URL through the proxy, loading the linked website in the same tab via the ProxyContent iframe.

quotes: make all websites function and connect

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a search result URL navigates to the proxied version of that site in the active tab
The address bar updates to reflect the navigated URL
The tab transitions from showing search results to showing proxied web content

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All backend logic must remain in the single main actor (backend/main.mo)
Do not change the existing tab management data model unless required to fix broken state
nonGoals: Adding new UI features or redesigning the visual theme
Implementing user authentication or Internet Identity login
Supporting non-HTTP/HTTPS protocols in the proxy
